description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet with a two-tone design, featuring a warm wooden top and legs paired with a white body. The front face displays two large doors on either side, each with a light wood accent panel, and a central section containing a single drawer beneath an open shelf. The cabinet stands on four short, angled wooden legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The doors and drawer are equipped with small, square wooden handles for easy access. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood and engineered wood, with ample internal storage space.
description: A modern, two-tone storage cabinet with a wooden top, white body, and accent panels, featuring two doors, a central drawer, and an open shelf. It stands on four short wooden legs and has a flat, spacious surface.
description_view_0: The back of the cabinet, showing a plain white panel and the wooden top and legs.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the cabinet's depth, wooden top, and white side panel.
description_view_2: The front view, displaying two accent-paneled doors, a central drawer, an open shelf, and small wooden handles.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wooden top and white side panel.
